name: Missed Appointment Recovery
description: Automatically reaches out to no-show patients to reschedule within 48 hours

name: New Patient Welcome Series
description: Sends welcome email, insurance verification request, and pre-appointment forms

name: Claim Denial Appeal
description: Auto-generates appeal letters and resubmits claims with corrected documentation

name: 90-Day AR Collection
description: Escalating collection sequence with payment plan offers before external collections

name: Annual Recall Reminder
description: Multi-channel recall campaign: SMS, email, and AI voice call to book cleaning

name: Treatment Plan Follow-Up
description: Follows up on unaccepted treatment plans with cost breakdowns and financing options

name: Birthday Campaign
description: Sends birthday greeting with special discount for next appointment

name: Post-Visit Review Request
description: Requests Google and Healthgrades reviews 2 hours after appointment completion

name: Doctor Leave Coverage Alert
description: Notifies front desk and reassigns affected appointments when a doctor goes on approved leave

name: Schedule Overflow Routing
description: Offers patients the next available doctor or clinic when a requested doctor's schedule is fully booked

name: Open Slot Recall Fill
description: AI Recall fills last-minute cancellations by texting recall-overdue patients an open slot
